finding_results.notes: Kitchen confrontation now sets a concrete YELLOW PLAN policy and communication constraint before training. Court scene escalates to enforcement: Jonah closes the session and logs a system-level restriction, replacing the repeated ask/deny loop with operational consequence.

summary: Revised chapter 5 to strengthen leverage progression between kitchen and court confrontations and to replace repetitive post-nurse numeric pain labeling with embodied, scene-specific consequence while preserving continuity and voice constraints.
